title: Steve Madden won’t give profit guidance as planned due to Supreme Court tariff ruling
author: Bill Peters
fullText: The shoe designer’s stock fell after it held off on providing a profit guidance like it said it would, citing uncertainties created by the Supreme Court’s tariff decision.
summary: The shoe designer’s stock fell after it held off on providing a profit guidance like it said it would, citing uncertainties created by the Supreme Court’s tariff decision.
